title: Canterville Castle Mystery
description: Enter the haunted Canterville Chase. Move between rooms, search for clues, and solve the mystery of the Canterville Ghost!

hotspots.popupText: The massive stone fireplace has logs burning, yet you feel a strange cold draft in the room.
hotspots.label: fireplace

hotspots.popupText: The mysterious bloodstain! The housekeeper says it cannot be removed and has been here since 1575.
hotspots.label: bloodstain

hotspots.popupText: You climb the spiral staircase to the spooky attic room...
hotspots.label: stairs

hotspots.popupText: You walk through the wooden door into the library...
hotspots.label: library door

hotspots.popupText: An open journal lies on the desk next to a candle. It describes the Canterville curse.
hotspots.label: journal

hotspots.popupText: Towering oak bookshelves stacked with ancient leather-bound grimoires.
hotspots.label: bookshelf

hotspots.popupText: Bright moonbeams filter through the gothic stained-glass window.
hotspots.label: window

hotspots.popupText: You go back to the Great Hall...
hotspots.label: hallway door

hotspots.popupText: A creaky wooden four-poster bed with a dusty patchwork quilt.
hotspots.label: bed

hotspots.popupText: An old heavy iron-bound oak chest. It is locked tight.
hotspots.label: chest

hotspots.popupText: Ah! You see a faint ghostly silhouette hiding behind the heavy red velvet curtain!
hotspots.label: ghost

hotspots.popupText: You go down the stairs back to the Great Hall...
hotspots.label: stairs down

challenges.promptText: Locate the mysterious bloodstain in the Great Hall.
Find the open journal in the Library that details the curse.
Find the old locked chest in the spooky attic bedroom.
Find the Canterville Ghost hiding in the attic room!
